auth_register_sub: Create the operator account to get started.
auth_password_hint: Aim for 10+ characters with a mix of cases, numbers and symbols.
auth_forgot_sub: We will email you a secure reset link.
auth_reset_sent: If that email is on file, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.
auth_reset_page_title: Canary Ground Control - Set a new password
auth_reset_sub: Choose a new password for your operator account.
auth_password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth_reset_link_invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth_reset_done: Password updated. Redirecting you to log in...
offline_link_dropped: The vehicle link dropped. Reconnect to redial it, or keep working from the last-known telemetry.
gc_step_plug: Plug the gamepad in over USB, or pair it through your system's Bluetooth settings.
gc_step_press: Press any button on it so the browser can see it.
gc_confirm_input: Move the sticks and press buttons to confirm the input reaches the browser.
lf_fullscreen_error: Error attempting to enable full-screen mode: {message} ({name})
lf_caution: Use Caution: The feed may be slightly delayed.
gs_no_gps_body: The flight controller reports {count} satellites. A mission needs a GPS fix to navigate. Wait for a fix, or fly manually with the gamepad.
gs_control_released: Control released to the flight controller.
gs_no_waypoints_body: Add positional waypoints to the plan first.
gs_fly_companion_body: The station steers this craft over MSP; it must already be airborne, armed, and in Angle + Altitude Hold. Keep the transmitter ready as a kill switch.
gs_bench_tested_check: I bench-tested channel directions with props off
gs_rth_failsafe: Land only on a failsafe return
gs_no_mission_body: Add waypoints to the plan first.
gs_area_clear_check: The area is clear and I am ready for an automatic takeoff
gs_rth_landing_label: Landing after a return to home (nav_rth_allow_landing)
gs_start_inav_body: INAV arms and flies the uploaded mission on its own, including an automatic takeoff. Make sure the area is clear, the craft has a GPS fix, and the transmitter is ready as a kill switch.
gs_start_inav_landing_note: On a return to home the plane lands or loiters overhead per the setting below; it applies until the flight controller powers off.
gs_landing_rejected_body: The flight controller rejected the change, so it returns at its current setting.
gs_takeoff_inav_body: INAV arms and climbs to the altitude under navigation, then holds position. Make sure the area is clear and the craft has a GPS fix.
sm_confirm_rtl: Are you sure you want to start the mission? Set the altitude in meters the vehicle uses when returning to launch, considering any obstacles between the mission area and the launch point.
sm_confirm: Are you sure you want to start the mission?
sm_rtl_not_set_body: The vehicle has not published its return-altitude parameter yet, so it returns at its current setting.
sm_return_not_set_body: The vehicle has not published its return parameter yet, so it returns at its current setting.
tl_confirm_takeoff_body: Are you sure you want to initiate takeoff? If so please specify the altitude.
tl_landing_sequence: The mission jumps to its landing sequence and the plane flies the approach down to touchdown.
tl_landing_autoland: The loaded mission has no Land action. With the box checked, a landing approach into the launch point uploads on the spot, placed clear of obstacles, terrain, and restricted airspace where map data allows, and the plane flies it down to touchdown; unchecked, the plane returns to launch and loiters overhead until you land it.
tl_landing_body: The plane is flying the landing approach down to touchdown.
tl_returning_body: The plane loiters over the launch point until you land it.
tl_confirm_land_mav: Are you sure you want to land the MAV?
pf_cannot_start: This mission cannot be started safely:
pf_auth_note: Flying in controlled airspace or inside an active restriction requires authorization, such as LAANC, an SGI waiver, or a COA.
pf_auth_attest_check: I have authorization for this airspace and accept responsibility for the flight
landing_hazard_timeout: Some hazard data did not load in time, so parts of the approach go unchecked.
la_terrain_unavailable: Terrain data is unavailable, so the approach is not checked against ground height.
la_all_corridors_blocked: Every approach corridor crosses an obstacle, rising terrain, or restricted airspace; flying the direct approach, watch the descent.
mc_not_available_px4_body: Manual position nudges require ArduPilot GUIDED mode. Use a mission or RC control for PX4 vehicles.
al_px4_note_seq: This mission carries a landing pattern. RTL_TYPE (also editable from the Parameters page) decides whether a return flies it or heads home to loiter.
al_px4_note_noseq: This mission has no Land action: the plane lands automatically only through a landing pattern in the mission, so a return loiters at the return point until you land it. Add a Land action to the end of the mission for an automatic landing.
al_px4_choice_1: Nearest rally point or mission landing
al_px4_choice_2: Follow the mission path to its landing
al_ap_note_seq: This mission carries a landing sequence. RTL_AUTOLAND (also editable from the Parameters page) decides whether a return to launch flies it or loiters at the return point.
al_ap_note_noseq: This mission has no Land action: a return to launch loiters overhead until you land the plane, and RTL_AUTOLAND acts only on a landing sequence in the mission. Add a Land action to the end of the mission for an automatic landing.
al_ap_choice_1: Return home, then fly the landing sequence
al_ap_choice_2: Go straight to the landing sequence
pa_path_clear_body: No leg crosses restricted airspace, an obstacle, or a building at its altitude.
pa_added_waypoints: Added {count} waypoints to route around {hazards} hazards.
pa_raised_waypoints: Raised {count} waypoints to clear obstacles or buildings.
pa_moved_waypoints: Moved {count} waypoints clear of restricted airspace.
pa_survey_body: Click the survey area corners on the map, then double-click to finish. Escape cancels.
pa_orbit_body: Click the orbit center on the map. Escape cancels.
pa_corridor_body: Click along the corridor path on the map, then double-click to finish. Escape cancels.
pa_sar_body: Click the search datum (last-known point) on the map. Escape cancels.
pa_structure_body: Click the center of the structure on the map. Escape cancels.
pa_clear_body: Are you sure you want to clear the current mission plan? This action will remove all actions from the map. Check the box to also clear the mission plan on the flight controller.
vl_home_current: Home set to the current position.
vl_home_entered: Home set to the entered point.
vl_home_fail_body: The vehicle rejected the home location.
vl_start_set_body: Origin and home set on the vehicle; local moves now reference this point.
vl_no_vehicle_body: Connect the autopilot, then set the start point.
vl_start_fail_title: Could not set the start point
vl_modal_body: Home is where the vehicle returns in RTL; leave latitude and longitude blank to use the current position. No-GPS mode also sets the global origin to this point so a vehicle with no GPS flies in local position referenced to it. Use the takeoff spot; leave altitude at 0 unless you know the field elevation.
vl_no_gps_check: No-GPS mode: also set the global origin for local flying
vl_invalid_coords_body: No-GPS mode needs a numeric latitude and longitude for the origin.
gpad_behavior_plane: the stick steers; release to hold heading, altitude, and airspeed
gpad_behavior_multi: sticks steer, centered sticks hold position
gpad_active_body: Flying in {label} mode: {behavior}. A running mission is paused until resumed.
gpad_mode_rejected_body: The vehicle refused its stick-flying mode; the gamepad stream continues in the current mode.
gpad_stopped_body: The vehicle is holding position; fly from the app controls or resume the mission.
gpad_streaming_body: Input is reaching the vehicle. Stick flying engages automatically once it is armed.
gpad_msp_body: The station arms and flies this craft by stick over MSP; no GPS needed. The motors spin when it arms, so keep the throttle down until you are ready.
gpad_props_clear_check: Props are clear and I am ready to arm
gpad_preparing_body: Preparing the flight controller for station control.
gpad_rejected_body: The flight controller rejected station control.
gpad_disarmed_body: Disarmed; control released to the flight controller.
gpad_msp_active_body: Sticks fly the craft; raise the throttle to take off.
sv_alt_exceeds: Waypoint {index} altitude {alt} m exceeds the station's {max} m altitude limit (Safety limits in Integrations).
sv_alt_below: Waypoint {index} altitude {alt} m is below the station's {min} m altitude floor (Safety limits in Integrations).
sv_geofence: Waypoint {index} is {distance} m from home, past the station's {radius} m geofence (Safety limits in Integrations).
sv_laanc_zero: Waypoint {index} sits in a 0 ft LAANC grid square{airport}; flying here needs manual FAA authorization.
sv_noun_laanc_zero: in a 0 ft LAANC grid square{airport}; flying here needs manual FAA authorization
sv_laanc_ceiling: Waypoint {index} altitude {alt} m is above the {ft} ft ({meters} m) LAANC ceiling here{airport}.
sv_leg_restricted: The leg from waypoint {from} to {to} crosses restricted airspace: {zone}.
sv_leg_controlled: The leg from waypoint {from} to {to} crosses controlled airspace: {zone}.
sv_leg_obstacle: The leg from waypoint {from} to {to} passes {distance} m from a {height} m {type}; plan at least {min} m there or route around it.
sv_takeoff_alt: Takeoff altitude should be above 0 m so the vehicle climbs before flying the route.
sv_takeoff_first: Takeoff should be the first command, but a waypoint comes before it.
sv_takeoff_alt_exceeds: Takeoff altitude {alt} m exceeds the station's {max} m altitude limit (Safety limits in Integrations).
sv_takeoff_in_restricted: The takeoff point is inside restricted airspace: {zone}.
sv_takeoff_in_controlled: The takeoff point is inside controlled airspace: {zone}.
sv_takeoff_laanc_zero: The takeoff point sits in a 0 ft LAANC grid square{airport}; flying here needs manual FAA authorization.
sv_takeoff_laanc_ceiling: Takeoff altitude {alt} m is above the {ft} ft ({meters} m) LAANC ceiling here{airport}.
sv_no_landing: Mission does not end with Return-to-Launch or Land; the vehicle will hold at the final waypoint.
mp_stop_confirm: Are you sure you want to stop the flight?
mp_stopped_body:
The mission has been stopped.
Returning to launch.
mp_pause_confirm: Are you sure you want to pause the flight?
mp_release_confirm:
Are you sure you want to release the payload?
Use caution and ensure the drop zone is clear.
mp_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this action?
mp_how_to: How do I create a mission plan?
mp_hint: Double-click the map to add a waypoint. Drag a marker to move it.
mps_optimize_body: Optimize Path checks the route against airspace, obstacles, and buildings, and adjusts waypoints and heights to clear them. Saving also loads the plan, overwriting the one currently loaded.
mps_saved_body: Plan saved. Press Start to fly it.
mps_upload_rejected: The flight controller rejected the mission.
mps_plan_saved_body: The mission plan has been saved.
mps_plan_updated_body: The mission plan has been updated.
home_tagline: Web-native ground control for autonomous flight, running on the aircraft itself.
home_sign_in_note: Sign in to reach the station.
home_firstrun_note: No operator account exists yet. Create one to get started.
home_feat_telemetry_desc: Attitude, position, battery and GPS over MAVLink, with arm, disarm and flight-mode control.
home_feat_planner_desc: Plot and edit waypoints on synced 2D and 3D maps.
home_feat_safety_desc: Restricted-airspace overlays with geofence, altitude and no-fly-zone checks before launch.
home_feat_callouts_desc: Spoken alerts for arming, mode changes, low battery, GPS and link loss.
home_feat_stacks_desc: Both autopilot stacks, detected and encoded automatically.
home_feat_camera_desc: Live video from the aircraft, streamed to the browser over WebRTC.
home_feat_optimize_desc: One-click routing that shortens the flight and steers legs clear of restricted airspace.
home_feat_import_desc: Load QGroundControl .plan and Mission Planner .waypoints files straight into the planner.
map_pattern_no_wp_body: Those parameters produce no waypoints; check the spacing against the area size.
map_survey_min_corners: A survey area needs at least three corners.
map_survey_desc: Serpentine transects across the drawn area.
map_corridor_min_points: A corridor needs at least two path points.
map_corridor_desc: Parallel lanes that sweep a strip along the drawn path.
map_sar_desc: An expanding square outward from the datum.
map_structure_desc: Stacked orbit rings that spiral up the structure.
map_orbit_desc: A ring of waypoints around the clicked center.
map_ceiling_show: Show LAANC ceiling grid (pre-approved altitude per square)
map_ceiling_hide: Hide LAANC ceiling grid (pre-approved altitude per square)
map_obstacles_show: Show obstacles (FAA towers and tall structures)
map_obstacles_hide: Hide obstacles (FAA towers and tall structures)
as_impl_eu_restricted: UAS geographical zone: operation is prohibited or requires prior authorization.
as_impl_eu_controlled: UAS geographical zone: check the applicable conditions before flying.
as_impl_special: Special-use airspace. Check activity and use caution.
as_impl_class_a: High-altitude airspace from {lower} up; far above UAS operating altitudes, so it is not a factor for low-altitude flight.
as_impl_surface: Controlled airspace down to the surface, so a UAS needs authorization (e.g. LAANC) here even at low altitude.
as_impl_above: Controlled airspace above {lower}; below that a UAS is in uncontrolled Class G. Authorization (e.g. LAANC) is needed only at or above the floor.
as_impl_controlled: Controlled airspace. UAS operations need authorization (e.g. LAANC).
hz_ceil_zero: LAANC authorization is not available in this square; flying here needs a manual FAA authorization.
hz_ceil_laanc: LAANC can authorize UAS flight up to {ft} ft AGL in this square; above that needs further FAA coordination.
hz_ceil_manual: The pre-approved ceiling here is {ft} ft AGL, and this facility does not offer LAANC, so authorization is manual.
hz_keep_clear: Keep clear; heights come from the FAA obstacle file.
al_saved_body: Your alert settings have been updated.
al_intro: Email the operator when the vehicle reports an event. Each email carries the live coordinates and telemetry, and is sent to the operator email using the SMTP set under Integrations.
al_turn_on: Turn on the events you want emailed.
alert_failsafe_desc: The vehicle entered a failsafe state.
alert_crash_desc: A likely crash: the vehicle disarmed while still airborne.
alert_battery_low_desc: Battery dropped to the low threshold.
alert_gps_lost_desc: GPS dropped below a usable fix.
alert_evt_crash: Unexpected disarm at {alt} m; a crash is likely.
alert_evt_failsafe: The vehicle entered a failsafe state.
api_reset_generic: If that email is on file, a reset link is on its way.
api_reset_email_failed: Email could not be sent. Check the SMTP settings under Integrations.
email_reset_body: A password reset was requested for your CanaryGC operator account.
email_reset_expiry: This link expires in one hour. If you did not request it, ignore this email.
api_too_many_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
api_registration_closed: Registration is closed: an operator account already exists
api_ai_not_configured: The AI assistant is not configured. Add an API key on the Integrations page.
api_no_pids: No PID parameters were provided. Refresh parameters and try again.
api_tuning_rejected: The tuning provider rejected the request ({status}).
api_tuning_unreachable: Could not reach the tuning provider: {error}
param_msp_hint: {model} settings live in the Betaflight or INAV Configurator.
param_ai_no_recs: The assistant found no gains worth changing right now.
param_ai_disclaimer: Review each change against your airframe. Re-test in a controlled hover before flying hard.
param_tune_no_pids: No PID parameters are loaded yet. Refresh parameters and try again.
param_tune_not_loaded: Parameter {id} is not loaded, cannot apply.
param_group_failsafe_blurb: What the vehicle does when RC, the ground link, the battery, or position estimation fails.
param_group_logging_blurb: Flight-log (blackbox) recording: where logs are written and which messages they capture.
param_group_osd_blurb: On-screen-display overlay drawn over the FPV video feed.
param_group_battery_blurb: Battery monitoring, capacity, and the voltage thresholds that arm the failsafes.
param_group_geofence_blurb: Virtual boundary the vehicle refuses to cross, and what it does at the edge.
param_group_return_blurb: Return-to-launch behavior: the climb, the path home, and the landing sequence.
param_help_fs_thr_enable: Action when the RC link is lost (throttle failsafe).
param_help_fs_thr_value: PWM below which the throttle channel counts as RC loss.
param_help_fs_gcs_enable: Action when the ground-station heartbeat is lost.
param_help_fs_ekf_action: Action when the EKF position estimate fails.
param_help_fs_crash_check: Disarm automatically when a crash is detected.
param_help_batt_fs_low_act: Action taken at the low-battery threshold.
param_help_batt_fs_crt_act: Action taken at the critical-battery threshold.
param_help_nav_rcl_act: Action when the RC link is lost.
param_help_nav_dll_act: Action when the data link (ground station) is lost.
param_help_com_low_bat_act: Action taken as the battery drains.
param_help_com_rc_loss_t: Seconds without RC before the failsafe triggers.
param_help_gf_action: Action when the geofence is breached.
param_help_log_backend_type: Where logs are written (SD card, MAVLink, or both).
param_help_log_bitmask: Which message groups are recorded to the log.
param_help_log_disarmed: Keep logging while the vehicle is disarmed.
param_help_log_file_dsrmrot: Start a new log file each time the vehicle disarms.
param_help_sdlog_mode: When the SD-card logger records (armed, from boot, or always).
param_help_sdlog_profile: Which topic profile the logger records.
param_help_osd_type: On-screen-display backend driving the video overlay.
param_help_osd_chan: RC channel that switches OSD screens.
param_help_osd_units: Measurement units shown on the overlay.
param_help_batt_capacity: Pack capacity in mAh used for the remaining estimate.
param_help_batt_low_volt: Voltage that triggers the low-battery failsafe.
param_help_batt_crt_volt: Voltage that triggers the critical-battery failsafe.
param_help_bat_low_thr: Remaining fraction that triggers the low-battery warning.
param_help_bat_crit_thr: Remaining fraction that triggers the critical action.
param_help_bat_emergen_thr: Remaining fraction that triggers the emergency landing.
param_help_fence_enable: Turn the geofence on or off.
param_help_fence_radius: Radius of the circular fence around home.
param_help_fence_action: Action when the fence is breached.
param_help_gf_max_hor_dist: Maximum horizontal distance from home before the fence acts.
param_help_gf_max_ver_dist: Maximum altitude before the fence acts.
param_help_rtl_alt: Altitude the vehicle climbs to before returning home.
param_help_rtl_loit_time: Time to loiter above home before landing.
param_help_rtl_return_alt: Altitude the vehicle returns at during RTL.
param_help_rtl_descend_alt: Altitude the vehicle descends to before the final landing.
fw_intro: Flash the firmware of a connected flight controller. A release is a firmware version; a target (or board) is the exact flight controller model it is built for, so pick both. Betaflight and INAV flash over USB DFU; ArduPilot and PX4 upload over the autopilot's own bootloader through its serial link.
fw_fc_not_configured: Set MSP_SERIAL_PATH to a Betaflight or INAV board's serial device to enable detection.
fw_fc_reads: Reads the firmware name and version over the MultiWii Serial Protocol.
fw_inav_desc: Official per-target hex from the INAV release, flashed over DFU.
fw_inav_unreachable: The INAV release catalog is unreachable right now.
fw_betaflight_desc: Built on demand by the Betaflight cloud, then flashed over DFU. A fresh build takes about a minute.
fw_betaflight_unreachable: The Betaflight catalog is unreachable right now.
fw_ardupilot_desc: Latest stable per board, uploaded over the autopilot's serial bootloader.
fw_ardupilot_unreachable: The ArduPilot manifest is unreachable right now.
fw_px4_desc: Release .px4 images per board, uploaded over the autopilot's serial bootloader.
fw_px4_unreachable: The PX4 release catalog is unreachable right now.
fw_hex_desc: Any Intel HEX, including a custom Betaflight cloud build, flashed over DFU.
fw_note_dfu: The board must be in DFU bootloader mode.
fw_note_betaflight: The firmware builds in the Betaflight cloud first, then the board must be in DFU bootloader mode.
fw_note_autopilot: The autopilot reboots into its bootloader and reconnects after the upload.
fw_detect_failed_body: Could not reach the flight controller.
fw_reboot_body: This restarts the connected flight controller into its DFU bootloader so it can be flashed. It will disconnect from telemetry until it is flashed or power-cycled. Continue?
fw_rebooting_body: The flight controller is entering DFU mode.
fw_reboot_failed_body: Could not send the reboot command.
fw_flash_confirm: About to flash {label}.{note} Do not disconnect power during the flash. Continue?
fw_see_log: See the flash log for details.
int_intro: Connect external services. Secrets are stored on this station and never shown again after saving.
int_smtp_desc: Regular SMTP to your own mail server. Powers password resets and alert emails.
int_tiles_desc: A MapTiler key gives a rich dark basemap and a labeled hybrid satellite. Leave blank for keyless tiles. Each mode accepts a custom XYZ tile URL to override the default.
int_camera_desc: The live feed serves one WebRTC stream; pick what feeds it. Applied to the running feed when you save.
int_camera_advertises: The vehicle advertises a camera stream{suffix}:
int_stream_hint: An IP camera, a companion computer, or a flight controller camera that advertises RTSP. MediaMTX transcodes it to WebRTC.
int_capture_hint: A USB analog capture dongle (analog FPV) or an HDMI grabber (HDZero, DJI, or Walksnail digital FPV, including a Betaflight board's FPV feed). MediaMTX captures it with FFmpeg.
int_pi_hint: The Raspberry Pi CSI camera on the companion computer. No extra hardware.
int_cam_saved: Saved. It applies once the camera bridge is reachable.
int_ai_desc: Powers the PID tuning assistant on the Vehicle Parameters page. Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint works (OpenAI, LiteLLM, Ollama).
int_ai_key_set: Leave blank to keep the saved key
int_ai_base_hint: The OpenAI-compatible base URL. Point it at a LiteLLM proxy or a local Ollama server to use another model.
int_mav_desc: Authenticates the link with a shared passphrase so only a party that holds it can command the vehicle, and forged or replayed messages are rejected. Saving pushes the key to the connected vehicle, so one passphrase secures both ends.
int_mav_key_set: Leave blank to keep the active key
int_mav_key_hint: Hashed to the 32-byte key with SHA-256, the same way QGroundControl and Mission Planner derive it.
int_link_hint: Identifies this ground station's channel to the vehicle. Leave at 1 unless another link already uses it.
int_strict_hint: On: any unsigned message is dropped. Off: unsigned messages still pass, which keeps the link up while the autopilot is being set up.
int_failsafe_desc: When the vehicle is armed and no operator has been connected for the window below, the station commands the recovery itself: return to launch for a copter, rover, or sub, and the autoland approach for a fixed wing.
int_failsafe_hint: 0 turns the failsafe off. The window starts when the last connected page closes and resets the moment one reconnects.
int_safety_desc: Flight limits every pre-flight and takeoff check enforces.
int_safety_max_alt_hint: The default 120 m matches the 400 ft small-UAS ceiling. Raise it only under an authorization that permits it.
int_lowbw_desc: The marginal-link posture for a weak cellular uplink.
int_lowbw_hint: Caps the video bitrate, thins the telemetry stream, and stops polling live traffic and airspace. Turn it on when the link degrades.
int_operator_desc: Used for password resets and as the alert recipient.
int_airspace_desc: Optional keys for worldwide airspace. Leave blank to use the keyless FAA fallback.
int_saved_body: Your integration settings have been updated.
int_signing_disabled_body: MAVLink messages are sent and accepted unsigned.
cal_intro: Calibrate the sensors on the connected {vehicle} vehicle. Run each on a disarmed vehicle and follow the prompts. Progress streams live from the autopilot.
cal_armed_warn: The vehicle is armed. Disarm it before calibrating.
cal_accel_desc: Hold the vehicle in each of the six orientations as prompted.
cal_compass_desc: Rotate the vehicle through all axes until it completes.
cal_gyro_desc: Keep the vehicle still on a level surface.
cal_level_desc: Set the level attitude with the vehicle sitting flat.
cal_desc_level: Flat on a level surface, wings horizontal, nose forward.
cal_desc_left: Rolled onto the left wing: left wingtip down, right wingtip up.
cal_desc_right: Rolled onto the right wing: right wingtip down, left wingtip up.
cal_desc_nosedown: Pitched nose straight down, tail up, held vertical.
cal_desc_noseup: Pitched nose straight up, tail down, held vertical.
cal_desc_back: Upside down on its back, belly up, wings horizontal.
cal_esc_desc: Set the throttle endpoints on every ESC so the motors respond together.
cal_esc_warn: Remove all propellers before you begin. The motors can spin at full throttle.
cal_esc_step1: Remove all propellers and disconnect the battery.
cal_esc_step2: Hold the transmitter throttle at maximum.
cal_esc_step3: Connect the battery and wait for the ready tones.
cal_esc_step4: Power-cycle the battery while the throttle stays high.
cal_esc_step5: Listen for the beeps that confirm the maximum endpoint.
cal_esc_step6: Lower the throttle to minimum; a long tone confirms the minimum.
cal_esc_step7: Raise the throttle slightly to confirm the motors spin together, then disconnect.
cal_esc_px4: On PX4, run ESC calibration from the actuator setup, disarmed and with propellers removed.
cal_esc_armed_hint: Semi-automatic mode armed. Power-cycle to run it.
cal_status_desc: Live calibration messages from the autopilot.
cal_disarm_run_body: Calibration runs only while the vehicle is disarmed.
cal_disarm_esc_body: Arm ESC calibration only while disarmed and with propellers removed.
cal_cmd_rejected: The autopilot did not accept the calibration command.
cal_param_unavail_body: ESC_CALIBRATION was not found on this vehicle; it may still be loading.
cal_esc_armed_body: Remove propellers, then power-cycle with the throttle held high and follow the steps.
cal_param_rejected: The autopilot did not accept the parameter write.
mmp_load_body: Are you sure you want to load this mission plan? This action will overwrite the currently loaded mission plan.
mmp_saved_body: The mission plan has been saved.
mmp_updated_body: The mission plan has been updated.
mmp_delete_body: Are you sure you want to delete this mission plan?
stats_px4_calib_body: Yaw-referenced compass calibration uses an ArduPilot command. Calibrate PX4 sensors from the Sensor Calibration page.
stats_calib_body: Are you sure you want to calibrate the sensors? If so please manually specify the current heading (direction) of the MAV in degrees.
stats_stop_body: Are you sure you want to stop the mission?
stats_stopped_body:
The mission has been stopped.
Returning to launch.
stats_pause_body: Are you sure you want to pause the mission?
stats_release_body:
Are you sure you want to release the payload?
Use caution and ensure the drop zone is clear.
stats_clear_body: Are you sure you want to clear the loaded mission plan? It is removed from the dashboard and cleared from the flight controller.
stats_cleared_body: The loaded mission plan has been cleared.
traffic_alert_now: {callsign} is inside the well-clear volume, {meters} m away.
traffic_alert_body: {callsign} closes to {meters} m in about {seconds} s.
